recommendations.title: 18 packages losing momentum
recommendations.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/starter-cyberpunk, @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/character-profile and 15 more show sustained decline. Consider: release updates, fix open issues, or update documentation.

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.74 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: 16 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @ai-rpg-engine/core, @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-weird-west. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 75 packages in critical health

actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: 14 packages in rapid decline

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.74 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 15 packages with untapped potential

actionableAdvice.action: Add new features, improve docs, or create tutorials. Small efforts can shift these from D to C+ quickly.
